subcodes.title: Words spoken en route in carriage in Haifa, 1915-02-07
subcodes.first_line: I never caused their separation. They separated themselves. The Blessed Beauty established a Covenant
subcodes.first_line_orig: من ابدا سبب فصل نشدم خودشان خود را از یکدیگر جدا کردند جمال مبارک عهدی گرفتند
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @creativity in art, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity in diversity, @goodly deeds; actions, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @unity; oneness of humanity
